name: Deviled Walleye Fillets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup grated provolone OR Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and green pepper in butter until soft.
2. Add mustard, soy sauce, cayenne (or Tabasco), and lemon juice to the pan. Stir well.
3. Mix in bread crumbs and grated cheese.
4. Season fillets with salt and pepper.
5. Place fillets on foil-lined broiler tray, about 4 inches from heat source.
6. Broil for 5 minutes.
7. Turn fish over, evenly covering with the breadcrumb-vegetable-cheese mixture.
8. Continue broiling for another 6-8 minutes. Serve.
